title: aralia lindenii
intro: Aralia lindenii, also known as Mexican mast tree or Mexican aralia, is a plant species belonging to the Araliaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Aralia lindenii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its bark and roots are also used to create herbal remedies and supplements.
